section.title: AI Use Across Project Performance Domains
section.description: This section considers the eight Project Performance Domains as defined in PMBOK 8th Edition.

questions.text: Please indicate how often you use AI tools to support tasks in each of the following Performance Domains:
questions.hint: Select one option per row to indicate your frequency of AI use in that domain.

rows.label: **Stakeholders**
rows.description: Identifying, analyzing, and engaging stakeholders effectively throughout the project

rows.label: **Team**
rows.description: Building, developing, and managing an effective project team

rows.label: **Development Approach & Life Cycle**
rows.description: Selecting and tailoring the development approach and project life cycle

rows.label: **Planning**
rows.description: Organizing and coordinating project activities, establishing baselines and plans

rows.label: **Project Work**
rows.description: Establishing processes and performing work to deliver project outcomes

rows.label: **Delivery**
rows.description: Delivering the scope and quality that the project was undertaken to achieve

rows.label: **Measurement**
rows.description: Assessing project performance and taking appropriate actions

rows.label: **Uncertainty**
rows.description: Managing risks, ambiguity, and complexity throughout the project

questions.text: Generate or QA project status reports using AI:
questions.hint: For the Measurement domain specifically, do you use AI for this activity?

questions.text: Use AI to forecast schedule or budget overruns:
questions.hint: For the Measurement domain specifically, do you use AI for this activity?
